summary.generationModeDescription: The app infers the layout from the letterhead PDF. One-page files are reused for every page. Two-page files use page 1 for the first output page and page 2 for the rest.

helper.inputs: Select one or more PDFs generated from Word.
helper.output: Select where the generated files should be saved.

drop.letterhead: Drag and drop one letterhead PDF here.
drop.inputs: Drag and drop one or more input PDFs here.
drop.output: Drag and drop an output folder here.

messages.selectAll: Select a letterhead, input PDFs, and output directory first.
messages.inputFilesEmptyDescription: Choose or drop PDFs to build the list.
messages.selectOutputAfter: You can open the output directory after generation.
messages.privacy: All files are processed locally on your computer. Nothing is uploaded.

errors.NO_INPUT_PDFS_SELECTED: Select at least one input PDF first.
errors.INVALID_PDF_FILE: One of the selected PDFs is invalid.
errors.DAMAGED_PDF_FILE: One of the selected PDFs is damaged.
errors.FAILED_TO_READ_FILE: The app could not read a file.
errors.FAILED_TO_WRITE_FILE: The app could not write the output file.
errors.OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_NOT_WRITABLE: The selected output directory is not writable.
errors.UNEXPECTED_PROCESSING_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred while processing the PDFs.
